assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 42-64 contain the full Security Configuration section with all three subsections matching the fixture exactly: Product Lifecycle (5 fields including 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle', 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT', 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200', 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:', 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'), Version Streams table (1 row: '2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md'), and Source Repositories table (2 rows: 'backend | https://github.com/example/backend' and 'frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui'). All values match the fixture at evals/setup/files/claude-md-configured-with-security.md lines 52-73.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 (lines 112-134) states: '`## Security Configuration` exists with all required fields populated and no `{{placeholder}}` markers.' It enumerates all subsections (Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, Source Repositories) and concludes on line 134: 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md contains a status table (lines 9-17) with the row: '| Security Configuration | Up to date | No changes needed |'. Additionally, line 21 states: 'No changes were made to the Project Configuration. The existing configuration was preserved as-is.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 (line 113) states the section 'exists with all required fields populated and no `{{placeholder}}` markers' and concludes 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' (line 134). No opt-in prompt is mentioned anywhere in the outputs. changes-log.md lists Security Configuration as 'Up to date | No changes needed'. The skill detected the fully populated section and skipped it without prompting.
